decisions.decision: Rebuilt 3 frontend files from Phase 14 base (bc28490) with Phase 15 removals applied on top
decisions.rationale: Phase 15 Wave 3 worktree was branched from pre-Phase-14 commit (e21deb5). Merge conflict resolved with --theirs discarded all Phase 14 additions to types.ts, ws-client.ts, room-card.ts

decisions.decision: Bureau preheat diagnosis: not a code bug
decisions.rationale: Preheat uses person arrival (safa scheduled midnight) as priority over zone schedule transition (15:15 comfort). next_setpoint_increase_at fallback only runs when next_arrival=None. Config/design issue, not a Phase 15 regression.

next_action: Ask user: 'Have you verified the fixes in the panel? Type approved to complete phase 15.' Then write 15-04-SUMMARY.md and run phase verifier.
context_notes: Two regressions were caused by Phase 15 worktree being branched from old commit. Both fixed by rebuilding frontend files from Phase 14 baseline. Bureau preheat investigated and root cause is config/design: safa's midnight arrival schedule dominates over zone schedule fallback.
